name: Italian Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together the flour and 1 pinch of salt.
2. Gradually add milk to the flour mixture, whisking constantly until smooth.
3. Stir in the oregano and set aside.
4. Whisk the eggs in another bowl.
5. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. In a greased pie plate or quiche dish, arrange the diced Mozzarella, salami, and pepperoni.
7. Pour the egg mixture over the vegetables.
8. Bake for 40-45 minutes until set. Let cool slightly before serving.
